keywords.Affinity: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each planeswalker you control.
keywords.Afflict: Whenever this creature becomes blocked, defending player loses 3 life.
keywords.Afterlife: When this permanent is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, create a 1/1 white and black Spirit creature token with flying.
keywords.Aftermath: Cast this spell only from your graveyard. Then exile it.
keywords.Amplify: As this creature enters, put three +1/+1 counters on it for each Dragon card you reveal in your hand.
keywords.Annihilator: Whenever this creature attacks, defending player sacrifices a permanent of their choice.
keywords.Ascend: If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.
keywords.Assist: You and up to one other player can spend mana to pay this kicker cost.
keywords.Aura Swap: {2}{U}: Exchange this Aura with an Aura card in your hand.
keywords.Awaken: If you cast this spell for {5}{W}{W}{W}, also put four +1/+1 counters on target land you control and it becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature with haste. It's still a land.
keywords.Backup: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If that's another creature, it gains the following abilities until end of turn.
keywords.Banding: Just ask around until you find someone who knows.
keywords.Bargain: You may sacrifice an artifact, enchantment, or token as you cast this spell.
keywords.Basic landcycling: {1}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Battle Cry: Whenever this creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
keywords.Bestow: If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it's not attached.
keywords.Blitz: If you cast this spell for its blitz cost, it gains haste and "When this creature dies, draw a card." Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.
keywords.Bloodthirst: If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, this creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it.
keywords.Bushido: Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn.
keywords.Buyback: You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.
keywords.Cascade: When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order.
keywords.Casualty: As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice a creature with power 3 or greater. When you do, copy this spell and you may choose a new target for the copy.
keywords.Champion: When this creature enters, sacrifice it unless you exile another Elf you control. When this creature leaves the battlefield, that card returns to the battlefield.
keywords.Changeling: This card is every creature type.
keywords.Choose a background: You can have a Background as a second commander.
keywords.Cipher: Then you may exile this spell card encoded on a creature you control. Whenever that creature deals combat damage to a player, its controller may cast a copy of the encoded card without paying its mana cost.
keywords.Cleave: You may cast this spell for its cleave cost. If you do, remove the words in square brackets.
keywords.Commander ninjutsu: {U}{B}, Return an unblocked attacker you control to hand: Put this card onto the battlefield from your hand or the command zone tapped and attacking.
keywords.Compleated: {B/P} can be paid with {B} or 2 life. If life was paid, this planeswalker enters with two fewer loyalty counters.
keywords.Conspire: As you cast this spell, you may tap two untapped creatures you control that share a color with it. When you do, copy it and you may choose a new target for the copy.
keywords.Convoke: Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.
keywords.Craft: {6}, Exile this artifact, Exile the two from among other permanents you control and/or cards from your graveyard: Return this card transformed under its owner's control. Craft only as a sorcery.
keywords.Crew: Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.
keywords.Cumulative upkeep: At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this permanent, then sacrifice it unless you pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.
keywords.Cycling: {2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.
keywords.Dash: You may cast this spell for its dash cost. If you do, it gains haste, and it's returned from the battlefield to its owner's hand at the beginning of the next end step.
keywords.Daybound: If a player casts no spells during their own turn, it becomes night next turn.
keywords.Deathtouch: Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.
keywords.Decayed: This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.
keywords.Delve: Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.
keywords.Demonstrate: When you cast this spell, you may copy it. If you do, choose an opponent to also copy it. Players may choose new targets for their copies.
keywords.Desertwalk: This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Desert.
keywords.Dethrone: Whenever this creature attacks the player with the most life or tied for most life, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
keywords.Devour: As this creature enters, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. This creature enters with that many +1/+1 counters on it.
keywords.Disguise: You may cast this card face down for {3} as a 2/2 creature with ward {2}. Turn it face up any time for its disguise cost.
keywords.Disturb: You may cast this card from your graveyard transformed for its disturb cost.
keywords.Doctor's companion: You can have two commanders if the other is the Doctor.
keywords.Double agenda: Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone and secretly choose two different card names. You may turn this conspiracy face up any time and reveal those names.
keywords.Double strike: This creature deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.
keywords.Dredge: If you would draw a card, you may mill two cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.
keywords.Echo: At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.
keywords.Embalm: {6}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a white Zombie Bird Warrior with no mana cost. Embalm only as a sorcery.
keywords.Emerge: You may cast this spell by sacrificing a creature and paying the emerge cost reduced by that creature's mana value.
keywords.Enchant: Battlefield, command, exile, and stack are shared zones. Each player has their own graveyard, hand, and library zones.
keywords.Encore: {6}{W}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: For each opponent, create a token copy that attacks that opponent this turn if able. They gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.
keywords.Enlist: As this creature attacks, you may tap a nonattacking creature you control without summoning sickness. When you do, add its power to this creature's until end of turn.
keywords.Entwine: Choose both if you pay the entwine cost.
keywords.Epic: For the rest of the game, you can't cast spells. At the beginning of each of your upkeeps, copy this spell except for its epic ability. You may choose a new target for the copy.
keywords.Equip: {3}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.
keywords.Escalate: Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.
keywords.Eternalize: {5}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a 4/4 black Zombie Human Shaman with no mana cost. Eternalize only as a sorcery.
keywords.Evoke: You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.
keywords.Evolve: Whenever a creature you control enters, if that creature has greater power or toughness than this creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
keywords.Exalted: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
keywords.Exploit: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.
keywords.Extort: Whenever you cast a spell, you may pay {W/B}. If you do, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain that much life.
keywords.Fabricate: When this creature enters, put two +1/+1 counters on it or create two 1/1 colorless Servo artifact creature tokens.
keywords.Fading: This creature enters with three fade counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a fade counter from it. If you can't, sacrifice it.
keywords.Fear: This creature can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or black creatures.
keywords.Firebending: Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}. This mana lasts until end of combat.
keywords.First strike: This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.
keywords.Flanking: Whenever a creature without flanking blocks this creature, the blocking creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.
keywords.Flash: You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.
keywords.Flashback: You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.
keywords.Flying: This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.
keywords.Food: Tap two Foods you control: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.
keywords.For Mirrodin!: When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 red Rebel creature token, then attach this to it.
keywords.Forestcycling: {2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Forestwalk: This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Forest.
keywords.Foretell: During your turn, you may pay {2} and exile this card from your hand face down. Cast it on a later turn for its foretell cost.
keywords.Fortify: {3}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.
keywords.Freerunning: You may cast this spell for its freerunning cost if you dealt combat damage to a player this turn with an Assassin or commander.
keywords.Fuse: You may cast one or both halves of this card from your hand.
keywords.Gift: You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they create a tapped 1/1 blue Fish creature token before its other effects.
keywords.Graft: This creature enters with three +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever another creature enters, you may move a +1/+1 counter from this creature onto it.
keywords.Gravestorm: When you cast this spell, copy it for each permanent put into a graveyard from the battlefield this turn.
keywords.Harmonize: You may cast this card from your graveyard for its harmonize cost. You may tap a creature you control to reduce that cost by an amount of generic mana equal to its power. Then exile this spell.
keywords.Haste: This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.
keywords.Haunt: When this creature dies, exile it haunting target creature.
keywords.Hexproof: This creature can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.
keywords.Hexproof from: This creature can't be the target of black spells or abilities your opponents control.
keywords.Hidden agenda: Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone and secretly choose a card name. You may turn this conspiracy face up any time and reveal that name.
keywords.Hideaway: When this land enters, look at the top four cards of your library, exile one face down, then put the rest on the bottom in a random order.
keywords.Horsemanship: This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with horsemanship.
keywords.Impending: If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with four time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.
keywords.Improvise: Your artifacts can help cast this spell. Each artifact you tap after you're done activating mana abilities pays for {1}.
keywords.Increment: Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
keywords.Indestructible: Effects that say "destroy" don't destroy this artifact.
keywords.Infect: A creature with infect deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters and to players in the form of poison counters.
keywords.Ingest: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles the top card of their library.
keywords.Intimidate: This creature can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or creatures that share a color with it.
keywords.Islandcycling: {2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Islandwalk: This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls an Island.
keywords.Job select: When this Equipment enters, create a 1/1 colorless Hero creature token, then attach this to it.
keywords.Jump: You may cast this card from your graveyard by discarding a card in addition to paying its other costs. Then exile this card.
keywords.Jump-start: You may cast this card from your graveyard by discarding a card in addition to paying its other costs. Then exile this card.
keywords.Kicker: You may pay an additional {B} as you cast this spell.
keywords.Legendary landwalk: This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a legendary land.
keywords.Level Up: {1}: Put a level counter on this. Level up only as a sorcery.
keywords.Lifelink: Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.
keywords.Living metal: During your turn, this Vehicle is also a creature.
keywords.Living weapon: When this Equipment enters, create a 0/0 black Phyrexian Germ creature token, then attach this to it.
keywords.Machina: {4}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.
keywords.Madness: If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.
keywords.Mayhem: You may cast this card from your graveyard for {B} if you discarded it this turn. Timing rules still apply.
keywords.Megamorph: You may cast this card face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. Turn it face up any time for its megamorph cost and put a +1/+1 counter on it.
keywords.Melee: Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each opponent you attacked this combat.
keywords.Menace: This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.
keywords.Mentor: Whenever this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature with lesser power.
keywords.Miracle: You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.
keywords.Mobilize: Whenever this creature attacks, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 red Warrior creature token. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.
keywords.Modular: This creature enters with three +1/+1 counters on it. When it dies, you may put its +1/+1 counters on target artifact creature.
keywords.More Than Meets the Eye: You may cast this card converted for {2}{U}{R}{W}.
keywords.Morph: You may cast this card face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. Turn it face up any time for its morph cost.
keywords.Mountaincycling: {2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Mountainwalk: This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Mountain.
keywords.Multikicker: You may pay an additional {2} any number of times as you cast this spell.
keywords.Mutate: If you cast this spell for its mutate cost, put it over or under target non-Human creature you own. They mutate into the creature on top plus all abilities from under it.
keywords.Myriad: Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token copy that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.
keywords.Nightbound: If a player casts at least two spells during their own turn, it becomes day next turn.
keywords.Ninjutsu: {1}{R}, Return an unblocked attacker you control to hand: Put this card onto the battlefield from your hand tapped and attacking.
keywords.Nonbasic landwalk: This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a nonbasic land.
keywords.Offspring: You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.
keywords.Outlast: {W}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.
keywords.Overload: You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each."
keywords.Paradigm: Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.
keywords.Partner: You can have two commanders if both have this ability.
keywords.Partner with: When this creature enters, target player may put Alphinaud Leveilleur into their hand from their library, then shuffle.
keywords.Persist: When this creature dies, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.
keywords.Phasing: This phases in or out before you untap during each of your untap steps. While it's phased out, it's treated as though it doesn't exist.
keywords.Plainscycling: {2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Plainswalk: This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Plains.
keywords.Plot: You may pay {2}{B} and exile this card from your hand. Cast it as a sorcery on a later turn without paying its mana cost. Plot only as a sorcery.
keywords.Protection: This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything blue.
keywords.Prototype: You may cast this spell with different mana cost, color, and size. It keeps its abilities and types.
keywords.Provoke: Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block it if able.
keywords.Prowess: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
keywords.Prowl: You may cast this for its prowl cost if you dealt combat damage to a player this turn with a Faerie or Rogue.
keywords.Rampage: Whenever this creature becomes blocked, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn for each creature blocking it beyond the first.
keywords.Ravenous: This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. If X is 5 or more, draw a card when it enters.
keywords.Reach: This creature can block creatures with flying.
keywords.Read Ahead: Choose a chapter and start with that many lore counters. Add one after your draw step. Skipped chapters don't trigger. Sacrifice after III.
keywords.Rebound: If you cast this spell from your hand, exile it as it resolves. At the beginning of your next upkeep, you may cast this card from exile without paying its mana cost.
keywords.Reconfigure: {5}: Attach to target creature you control; or unattach from a creature. Reconfigure only as a sorcery. While attached, this isn't a creature.
keywords.Recover: When a creature is put into your graveyard from the battlefield, you may pay {2}{B}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand. Otherwise, exile this card.
keywords.Reinforce: {2}{G}, Discard this card: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature.
keywords.Renown: When this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it isn't renowned, put two +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes renowned.
keywords.Replicate: When you cast this spell, copy it for each time you paid its replicate cost. You may choose new targets for the copies. Copies become tokens.
keywords.Retrace: You may cast this card from your graveyard by discarding a land card in addition to paying its other costs.
keywords.Riot: This creature enters with your choice of a +1/+1 counter or haste.
keywords.Ripple: When you cast this spell, you may reveal the top four cards of your library. You may cast spells with the same name as this spell from among those cards without paying their mana costs. Put the rest on the bottom of your library.
keywords.Saddle: Tap any number of other creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Mount becomes saddled until end of turn. Saddle only as a sorcery.
keywords.Scavenge: {4}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.
keywords.Shadow: This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.
keywords.Shroud: This creature can't be the target of spells or abilities.
keywords.Skulk: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.
keywords.Slivercycling: {3}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Sliver card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Sneak: You may cast this spell for {2}{W}{B} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. It enters tapped and attacking.
keywords.Soulbond: You may pair this creature with another unpaired creature when either enters. They remain paired for as long as you control both of them.
keywords.Soulshift: When this creature dies, you may return target Spirit card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.
keywords.Spectacle: You may cast this spell for its spectacle cost rather than its mana cost if an opponent lost life this turn.
keywords.Splice: As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.
keywords.Split second: As long as this spell is on the stack, players can't cast spells or activate abilities that aren't mana abilities.
keywords.Spree: Choose one or more additional costs.
keywords.Squad: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may pay {1}{W} any number of times. When this enchantment enters, create that many tokens that are copies of it.
keywords.Start your engines!: If you have no speed, it starts at 1. It increases once on each of your turns when an opponent loses life. Max speed is 4.
keywords.Station: Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Spacecraft. Station only as a sorcery. It's an artifact creature at 10+.
keywords.Storm: When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn.
keywords.Sunburst: This artifact enters with a charge counter on it for each color of mana spent to cast it.
keywords.Surge: You may cast this spell for its surge cost if you or a teammate has cast another spell this turn.
keywords.Suspend: Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{R} and exile it with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.
keywords.Swampcycling: {2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Swampwalk: This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Swamp.
keywords.Toxic: Players dealt combat damage by this creature also get two poison counters. A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.
keywords.Training: Whenever this creature attacks with another creature with greater power, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
keywords.Trample: This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.
keywords.Transfigure: {1}{B}{B}, Sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a creature card with the same mana value as this creature, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Transfigure only as a sorcery.
keywords.Transmute: {1}{U}{U}, Discard this card: Search your library for a card with the same mana value as this card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Transmute only as a sorcery.
keywords.Tribute: As this creature enters, an opponent of your choice may put two +1/+1 counters on it.
keywords.Umbra armor: If enchanted creature would be destroyed, instead remove all damage from it and destroy this Aura.
keywords.Undaunted: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each opponent.
keywords.Undying: When this creature dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.
keywords.Unearth: {R}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.
keywords.Unleash: You may have this creature enter with a +1/+1 counter on it. It can't block as long as it has a +1/+1 counter on it.
keywords.Vanishing: This land enters the battlefield with four time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.
keywords.Vigilance: Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.
keywords.Ward: Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.
keywords.Warp: You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.
keywords.Web-slinging: You may cast this spell for {R}{G} if you also return a tapped creature you control to its owner's hand.
keywords.Wither: This deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.
keywords.Wizardcycling: {2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Wizard card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
